evals.prompt: We are redesigning a dashboard while another dev keeps adding features. How should we use git?
evals.expected_output: A dev/main or similar branch model, short-lived feature branches, PR slicing, worktree guidance, and visual-vs-behavior separation.
assertions: Addresses redesign and parallel feature work
Mentions worktrees or side-by-side comparison when useful

evals.prompt: I want Codex to help in this repo but I do not want it overwriting files my teammate is editing.
evals.expected_output: An agent-safe workflow with branch prefix, lock file, explicit scope, and human review.

evals.prompt: I am solo but want clean commits and deployable main for a client prototype.
evals.expected_output: A lightweight workflow with main/dev or protected main, conventional commits, short branches, and merge checklist.
